title: Lego Studs over Experience Orbs
body:
**WARNING - I HIGHLY RECOMMEND EITHER HAVING OPTIFINE, OR INSTALLING MORE MCMETA, ANIMATICA OR ONE OF ITS FORKS! WITHOUT THEM, STUDS WILL NOT SPIN!**
##

This rp is pretty self explanatory, all things considered. All XP orbs are now studs from lego games, and XP bottles are Minikits (Modeled by me, based off of [Ewan Howell's Minikit model](https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/minecraft-star-wars-minikit-f810cc698a8842acbafb401d09540751).)
Studs have varying colors based on their value.
Has a custom lang file that refers to XP Orbs and XP Bottles as Studs and Minikits.
Has [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) support.

The sounds are taken straight from Lego Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga, due to their high quality, and number of variants.
